title: hamam #2000
definition:
1) to move noisily, confuse, make a noise, discomfit, break, consume,
    crush, destroy, trouble, vex
    1a) (Qal)
        1a1) to move noisily
        1a2) to confuse, discomfit, vex
nasbUsage:
Definition: 1) to move noisily, confuse, make a noise, discomfit, break, consume,
    crush, destroy, trouble, vex
    1a) (Qal)
        1a1) to move noisily
        1a2) to confuse, discomfit, vex

    NASB:  to make a noise, move noisily, confuse, discomfit
